skills.purpose: 依臺灣 108 課綱設計教案。
skills.minimum_verification: Create a lesson outline from an approved brief.

skills.purpose: 把教學結構轉為可審閱的投影片規格。
skills.minimum_verification: Create a 3-slide outline and render at least one slide when OfficeCLI is installed.

skills.purpose: 依學習目標建立素養導向命題。
skills.minimum_verification: Produce a blueprint, questions, answers, and explanations.

skills.purpose: 建立可列印或數位使用的學習單。
建立可觀察、可評量的規準。
skills.minimum_verification: Create a rubric with levels and observable descriptors.

skills.purpose: 開發小型互動教學工具並可發布。
skills.minimum_verification: Create a static local app and pass a browser preview.

skills.purpose: 建立正向班級經營與班級文化材料。
skills.minimum_verification: Create a de-identified class agreement draft.
Create a teacher-reviewed draft; never send automatically.
Create a document outline against an approved template.

skills.purpose: 建立會議議程、紀錄與行動項目。
skills.minimum_verification: Create an agenda and action tracker; do not create calendar events automatically.

claude_code_optional_plugins.purpose: 補足 PPTX、DOCX、PDF、XLSX 文件格式與編輯規則。
claude_code_optional_plugins.verification: Create a minimal document through a selected document workflow, then inspect the output.
claude_code_optional_plugins.scope: Claude Code only; do not claim it is installed for other providers.

officecli.purpose: 產製與渲染 Office 文件，讓 Agent 能做視覺 QA。
